response.overview: The Hand You’re Dealt is a psychological neo-noir thriller following Adrien Prescott, a socially withdrawn former enforcer for a secretive criminal hierarchy built around playing card ranks. After refusing a contract that would have left a young boy watching his mother die, Prescott becomes the organization’s next target.  What begins as a routine birthday visit to his mother’s grave spirals into a brutal confrontation with Ace — the organization’s violent and unpredictable second-in-command — and Evelyn Voss, a conflicted operative caught between ambition and conscience. As loyalties fracture and buried guilt resurfaces, Prescott is forced to confront the system that shaped him and decide whether mercy is worth dying for.
response.title: The Hand You’re Dealt
